headlines: City council votes to extend parking meter hours — third time this month.
Sinkhole opens on Elm Street; resident calls it 'an improvement to the neighbourhood.'
Economists warn of moderate uncertainty; urge cautious optimism.
Warehouse fire on the industrial estate ruled accidental; investigators decline further comment.
Local man claims scrapyard shitbox 'has character.' Neighbours disagree.
Bus route 14 cancelled indefinitely due to 'operational considerations.'
Fuel prices up again. Analysts cite 'various factors.'
Council approves new roundabout despite near-universal opposition.
Mysterious billboard appears overnight; no one claims responsibility.
Unemployment flat. 'Steady' says spokesperson. No further questions taken.
Dog found on motorway returned to owner. Car not yet located.
New café opens downtown. Closes same week. Building immediately relisted.
Potholes on Gravel Road described as 'under review' for fourth consecutive quarter.
Local mechanic wins regional award. 'It's just bolts,' he says.
Power outage blamed on 'scheduled maintenance.' Duration unspecified.
City announces 'Smart Parking' initiative. Meters to be replaced with slightly newer meters.
Used car prices reach new high. Experts divided on whether this is good or bad.
Man fined for parking on footpath. Appeals on grounds that nobody uses that footpath.
Traffic light on Main Street stuck on amber since Tuesday. Investigation ongoing.
Regional index fund posts 'mixed results' for third quarter running.

gigTemplates.title: Moving crew needs an extra pair of hands
gigTemplates.description: Bigfoot Removals is short-staffed for the day. Heavy lifting, nothing glamorous. Cash in hand.

gigTemplates.title: Warehouse unloading — one day only
gigTemplates.description: Night delivery came in early. Owner needs it sorted before the morning shift. Show up, work fast, get paid.

gigTemplates.title: Market stall hand wanted — cash daily
gigTemplates.description: Farmers' market needs a spare set of hands. Set up, run the register, pack down. Straightforward.

gigTemplates.title: Garden clearance — full day rate
gigTemplates.description: Old couple on Harrow Lane need their back yard sorted out. Overgrown. Bring gloves.

gigTemplates.title: Furniture delivery assistant needed
gigTemplates.description: One-day cover for a delivery driver's mate. Heavy stuff. Tips possible.

gigTemplates.title: Event setup crew — tonight only
gigTemplates.description: Community hall booking ran long. Need the room cleared and reset before the next one. Quick turnaround.

gigTemplates.title: Kitchen hand — lunch rush cover
gigTemplates.description: Short-staffed at the café on Bridge Street. Dishes, prep, general chaos. Feed yourself on the job.

gigTemplates.title: Painting assistant — residential job
gigTemplates.description: Tradesman needs a second person for a house repaint. No experience needed — you hold the ladder and roll walls.

gigTemplates.title: Stock count at local hardware store
gigTemplates.description: Annual inventory. Walk the aisles, count the screws. Not exciting, but it pays and it's indoors.

gigTemplates.title: Road crew labourer — day rate
gigTemplates.description: Council works crew is a man short on the Eastfield resurfacing job. Hard hat and boots if you have them.

gigTemplates.title: Leaflet distribution — whole suburb
gigTemplates.description: Real estate firm needs flyers dropped across the north end today. You walk, you drop, you're done.

gigTemplates.title: Office clean — after hours
gigTemplates.description: Regular cleaner called in sick. Three-floor office building. Equipment provided. Key left under the mat.

gigTemplates.title: Scrap metal collection run
gigTemplates.description: Scrap dealer needs loads picked up from three residential properties and dropped at the yard. Day's work.

gigTemplates.title: Security cover — overnight not required
gigTemplates.description: Construction site on Millbrook Ave needs eyes on it for the day while the regular's off sick. Sit, watch, report.

gigTemplates.title: Demolition assist — internal strip-out
gigTemplates.description: Tradesman stripping an old office fit-out before the builder comes in. Swing a hammer, fill a skip.
